basic_details.organization_name: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health & Medical Sciences (NEIGRIHMS)
basic_details.short_information: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health & Medical Sciences (NEIGRIHMS) Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website neigrihms.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Data Entry Operator post through the NEIGRIHMS Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation as per Govt. rule for ST/SC/OBC candidates will be applicable.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with knowledge of data entry work
qualification.details: Graduate with knowledge of data entry work.

content_sections.heading: NEIGRIHMS Data Entry Operator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NEIGRIHMS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NEIGRIHMS Data Entry Operator Job 2026 Notification PDF

NEIGRIHMS Data Entry Operator Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Graduate with knowledge of data entry work.

content_sections.heading: NEIGRIHMS Data Entry Operator Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation as per Govt. rule for ST/SC/OBC candidates will be applicable.

content_sections.heading: NEIGRIHMS Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
NEIGRIHMS Data Entry Operator Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for NEIGRIHMS Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: NEIGRIHMS Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NEIGRIHMS Data Entry Operator recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on the scheduled date, which is 17 July 2026. Ensure you reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is a Graduate degree with demonstrated knowledge of data entry work. Please refer to the official notification for any specific details or nuances.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Data Entry Operator position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Data Entry Operator post is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Data Entry Operator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000 per month for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Data Entry Operator position at NEIGRIHMS through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online; they should directly attend the interview with their documents.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the NEIGRIHMS Data Entry Operator recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves Document Verification, followed by a Skill Test, and finally an Interview to assess the candidate's suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the NEIGRIHMS located?
faq.answer: NEIGRIHMS is located in Shillong, Meghalaya, with the pincode 793018. The specific venue for the walk-in interview will be detailed in the official notification.
